title: gh-stack file
description: Schema for the .git/gh-stack file that stores the state of all stacks in a repository.

repository.description: The owner/name slug of the repository (e.g. 'github/gh-stack').

stacks.description: All stacks tracked in this repository.

id.description: Identifier for this stack, populated from the API when available.

state.description: State of the stack from the API (e.g. 'open', 'merged').

open.description: Whether the stack is open or closed.

trunk.description: The trunk (base) branch of the stack.

branches.description: Ordered list of branches in the stack, from bottom to top.

branchRef.description: A reference to a branch and its associated commit hash. For the trunk, 'head' stores the HEAD commit. For stacked branches, 'base' stores the merge-base commit (the last common commit before divergence from the parent branch).

head.description: The HEAD commit SHA of this branch. Used for the trunk branch.

base.description: The merge-base commit SHA — the last commit before this branch diverged from its parent. Used for stacked branches.

pullRequest.description: Associated pull request information, if a PR exists for this branch.

pullRequestRef.description: A snapshot of relatively immutable pull request metadata.

url.description: Direct URL to the pull request.

title.description: The PR title at the time it was recorded.
